Internal memo by Garnet & Loke LLC to Harbour Pine Capital Limited (SGX Mainboard issuer): proposed acquisition of Heliotrope Robotics Limited.
Under PDPA and SFA/SGX principles, this note is for internal circulation only and is not a trading instruction or public disclosure.
Ms. Aveline Khoo, Senior IR Manager at Harbour Pine Capital, DOB 14-03-1990, based at 12 Bayleaf Square, Lvl 25, Jade Promenade, accessed the draft offer via notebook "HPC-LT-90AK" and handset "QuokkaPhone-12" on 28-05-2026 08:16 SGT.
Corporate email aveline.khoo@harbourpine.com.sg, internal account "sap_hkhoo-0314", session ref se ss-90ak-2026-05-28, and chat link https://threadworks.harbourpine.com/ch/offer?t=pre&uid=avk-0314 together may identify an individual.
Treat those quasi-identifiers as personal data under PDPA; avoid forwarding outside the deal team and log access in the PDPA register.
The Draft Announcement includes an indicative cash consideration of S$2.02 per Heliotrope share and synergy assumptions of S$11.2m; this is MNPI under SFA/SGX as not generally available and reasonably expected to affect price.
We note no material adverse change is triggered by supplier delays; this is not a MAC and not a profit warning.
A 35-year-old engineer in Citrus Park using an OrchidOS handset and commuting by bus, without more, is not identifiable and should not be treated as specific personal data.
Public-source references (e.g., Heliotrope’s 2025 ESG overview publicly posted) can be used for diligence, but do not combine with internal Q3 run-rate models.
IT logs show a guest Wi‑Fi login at the Bayleaf Square meeting room at 10:03 SGT under device "HPC‑LT‑?0AK" with masked MAC 00-1A-**-**-7D-5F; combined with role and time, re-identification risk is non-trivial.
meeting url h t t p s ://dealroom.harbourpine.com.sg/m&a/rf q?id=MB-2026-061&ses=7d5f_90ak, broken characters reflect OCR artefacts in the scan and do not alter content.
Contact Compliance at compliance@harbourpine.com.sg or ext 8421 for SGX Listing Manual Rule 703/704 queries; do not send the Draft via ChitChat and never share passwords.
Employment matters: coordinate with HR on retention pools and notify staff via PDPA-compliant notices before adding users to the data room; do not collect NRIC numbers for meeting access.
Capital Markets workflow: pre-clear analyst briefing decks through DealVault‑IR, maintain an updated insider list, and stage the release for 7:30 a.m. SGT pending SGXnet clearance.
Reference-only: ledger ac c t 00 3-9 7-AX and device tag "MBR‑22" appear in logs without personal names; standing alone they are not PDPA personal data.
